message:
Add bulkhead combinator and core symbol types for RaptorQ layer

- Implement bulkhead combinator for resource isolation:
  - BulkheadPolicy with max_concurrent, max_queue, queue_timeout
  - BulkheadPermit with weighted permits
  - BulkheadMetrics for observability (utilization, queue depth)
  - BulkheadRegistry for managing named bulkheads
  - Comprehensive test suite (1200+ lines)

- Implement core symbol types (asupersync-p80):
  - ObjectId: 128-bit unique identifier for encoded objects
  - SymbolId: identifies symbol within object (SBN + ESI)
  - Symbol: encoded data with metadata
  - ObjectParams: encoding parameters for RaptorQ
  - SymbolKind: source vs repair symbol distinction
  - Full test coverage with Debug/Display formatting

These are foundational types for the RaptorQ-based distributed
structured concurrency layer.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
